original: This tiny glass vial is full of a frothy pink liquid - the venom of a red myr woman. It’s a potent aphrodisiac, and may be somewhat addictive.\n\nMay induce very slight taint. See your Codex for details.
{var0}+{var1}+" doesn’t seem interested in using this item....
